| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Status | Accepted |
| Date | 2026-06-17 |
| Modules | core, chat |
| Summary | Reviewable SQL, no string literals in Java; @InjectSql + sql/ files; NamedParameterJdbcTemplate :name binds only; no inline SQL. |

## DEC-014 — Multi-agent memory-bank isolation

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Status | Accepted |
| Date | 2026-06-21 |
| Modules | all |
| Summary | Partition memory-bank into reference/generated/registry/records/locks/worktrees to prevent parallel-agent merge conflicts; append-only JSONL registries; per-record files; module locks; worktree scratchpads. |
| Body | [records/decisions/DEC-014.md](records/decisions/DEC-014.md) |
